# Can You File Bankruptcy Twice? -- Rules & Limits [2026]
> Yes, you can file bankruptcy twice. Learn the waiting periods between Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings. 2026 rules explained.

## About
canifilebankruptcytwice.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Can You File Bankruptcy Twice? -- Rules & Limits: https://canifilebankruptcytwice.com/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
